sentences.text_original: 下个星期就是春节了，你准备怎么过？
sentences.pinyin: Xià ge xīngqī jiù shì Chūnjié le, nǐ zhǔnbèi zěnme guò?
sentences.text_translation: Keyingi hafta Bahor bayrami, uni qanday o'tkazmoqchisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: На следующей неделе уже Праздник весны, как собираешься его провести?
sentences.text_translation_en: Next week is the Spring Festival — how are you planning to spend it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我打算回老家跟家人一起过年。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ dǎsuàn huí lǎojiā gēn jiārén yìqǐ guò nián.
sentences.text_translation: Ona yurtimga qaytib, oilam bilan birga yangi yilni kutib olmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Планирую вернуться в родной дом и встретить Новый год с семьёй.
sentences.text_translation_en: I plan to go back to my hometown and celebrate the New Year with my family.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ duō jiǔ méi huí jiā le?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как давно ты не был дома?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long has it been since you went home?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 差不多一年了。很想念父母和家乡的味道。
sentences.pinyin: Chàbuduō yì nián le. Hěn xiǎngniàn fùmǔ hé jiāxiāng de wèidào.
sentences.text_translation: Deyarli bir yil bo'ldi. Ota-onamni va tug'ilgan yurtim ta'mini juda sog'indim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Почти год. Очень скучаю по родителям и по вкусу родных мест.
sentences.text_translation_en: Almost a year. I really miss my parents and the flavors of home.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 春节你们家有什么传统？
sentences.pinyin: Chūnjié nǐmen jiā yǒu shénme chuántǒng?
sentences.text_translation: Bahor bayramida sizning oilangizda qanday an'analar bor?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Какие традиции у вашей семьи на Праздник весны?
sentences.text_translation_en: What traditions does your family have for the Spring Festival?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我们一家人会一起吃年夜饭、包饺子、看春晚。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen yì jiā rén huì yìqǐ chī niányèfàn, bāo jiǎozi, kàn Chūnwǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Butun oila birga yangi yil arafasidagi kechki ovqatni yeymiz, chuchvara tugamiz va gala-konsertni tomosha qilamiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вся семья вместе ужинает в канун Нового года, лепит пельмени и смотрит новогодний гала-концерт.
sentences.text_translation_en: Our whole family eats the New Year's Eve dinner together, makes dumplings, and watches the Spring Festival Gala.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì xǐhuān nǎ dào cài?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Какое блюдо тебе нравится больше всего?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which dish do you like best?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我最喜欢妈妈做的红烧鱼，因为「鱼」代表「年年有余」。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuì xǐhuān māma zuò de hóngshāo yú, yīnwèi 'yú' dàibiǎo 'niánnián yǒuyú'.
sentences.text_translation: Eng yoqtirganim — onam tayyorlaydigan qizil dimlangan baliq, chunki «baliq» (yú) «har yili mo'l-ko'lchilik» (niánnián yǒuyú) ramzi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Больше всего люблю рыбу в соевом соусе, которую готовит мама, ведь «рыба» (юй) символизирует «достаток каждый год».
sentences.text_translation_en: My favorite is the braised fish my mom makes, because "fish" (yú) represents "surplus every year."
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 原来是这样！你们家放鞭炮吗？
sentences.pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng! Nǐmen jiā fàng biānpào ma?
sentences.text_translation: Mana qanaqa ekan! Uyingizda petarda otishadimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вот оно что! А у вас дома запускают петарды?
sentences.text_translation_en: So that's why! Does your family set off firecrackers?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 现在城市里不让放了，但是我们会贴春联和挂灯笼。
sentences.pinyin: Xiànzài chéngshì lǐ bú ràng fàng le, dànshì wǒmen huì tiē chūnlián hé guà dēnglong.
sentences.text_translation: Hozir shaharda otishga ruxsat berilmaydi, lekin biz bahor bayrami juftbaytlarini yopishtiramiz va fonus osamiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сейчас в городе их запускать не разрешают, но мы клеим новогодние парные надписи и вешаем фонарики.
sentences.text_translation_en: They're not allowed in the city now, but we paste Spring Festival couplets and hang lanterns.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Have you gotten a red envelope yet?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还没到时候。今年我工作了，可能要给爸妈发红包。
sentences.pinyin: Hái méi dào shíhou. Jīnnián wǒ gōngzuò le, kěnéng yào gěi bà mā fā hóngbāo.
sentences.text_translation: Hali vaqti kelmadi. Bu yil ishlay boshladim, balki ota-onamga qizil konvert berishim kerak bo'lar.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё не время. В этом году я уже работаю, так что, наверное, сам буду дарить родителям красные конверты.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not time yet. This year I'm working, so I might have to give my parents red envelopes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà shuōmíng nǐ zhēn de zhǎng dà le!
sentences.text_translation_en: That shows you've really grown up!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是啊。过节最重要的不是礼物和吃的，而是家人在一起。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a. Guòjié zuì zhòngyào de bú shì lǐwù hé chī de, ér shì jiārén zài yìqǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Bayramda eng muhimi sovg'a yoki ovqat emas, balki oilaning birga bo'lishi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Самое важное в празднике — не подарки и не еда, а то, что семья вместе.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah. The most important thing about a holiday isn't gifts or food, but being together with family.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你说得太对了！祝你春节快乐！
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de tài duì le! Zhù nǐ Chūnjié kuàilè!
sentences.text_translation: Juda to'g'ri aytding! Bahor bayrami muborak bo'lsin!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как же ты прав! С праздником весны тебя!
sentences.text_translation_en: You're so right! Happy Spring Festival!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xièxie! Yě zhù nǐ Chūnjié kuàilè!
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat! Senga ham Bahor bayrami muborak!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо! И тебя с праздником весны!
sentences.text_translation_en: Thank you! Happy Spring Festival to you too!
sentences.speaker: B
